raw_consumer_statement: My cousin on XXXX said she received {$100000.00} grant from this guy. I asked about it and XXXX XXXX XXXX contacted me and wanted XXXX gift card to pay processing fee. I was unable to leave the house to get the gift card due to broken hip and walker use. Finally used XXXX ( American Express ) to send {$1500.00} only because my cousin vouch for him. They spoofed her XXXX account. It wasn't until I called her ( she did not know about it and finally blocked him ) Then I realize it was fraud, too late. Unable to stop transaction as it was friends and family on XXXX. I opened a case with the FBI as well. I'm a 60 % disable Veteran.
